title.zh: 柴斌 — GPU 性能工程师

site.description: Bin Chai is a senior software engineer at NVIDIA with full-stack expertise spanning algorithm strategy, platform architecture, and low-level GPU performance optimization.
site.ogDescription: Full-stack AI systems engineering—from algorithm strategy and platform architecture to low-level GPU performance optimization.

role.zh: NVIDIA 高级软件开发工程师

lead.en: I'm a **full-stack AI systems engineer** whose work spans **algorithm strategy**, **platform architecture**, and **low-level GPU performance optimization**.
lead.zh: 我是覆盖**算法策略**、**中台架构**到**底层 GPU 性能优化**的**全栈选手**。

text.en: CUDA/CUTLASS kernel development and end-to-end performance engineering.
text.zh: CUDA/CUTLASS 高性能 Kernel 开发与端到端性能优化。

text.en: Generative recommendation systems including OneRec and HSTU.
text.zh: OneRec、HSTU 等生成式推荐系统的训练与推理加速。

text.en: Production GPU retrieval, LLM/MoE training, and big-data acceleration.
text.zh: 生产级 GPU 检索、LLM/MoE 训练与大数据加速。

text.en: Previously built recommendation infrastructure at Hulu and Baidu.
text.zh: 曾在 Hulu 与百度从事推荐基础设施和算法研发。

meta.zh: 高级软件开发工程师 · DevTech · 2023.08—至今

description.en: Optimized customized FlashAttention-2 backward kernels with CUTLASS and profiled the distributed training path for Kuaishou's production generative recommender.
description.zh: 结合客户定制化参数，使用 CUTLASS 优化 FlashAttention-2 反向 Kernel，并完成分布式训练链路分析与优化。

results.zh: 支持 OneRec 一期上线。

results.en: Presented the work at GTC San Jose 2026.
results.zh: 作为讲者在 GTC San Jose 2026 分享。

description.en: Built fused HSTU attention kernels for A100 using CUTLASS GEMM and CUDA operator fusion, improving compute and memory pipelines.
description.zh: 基于 CUTLASS GEMM 与 CUDA 算子融合实现 A100 高性能 HSTU 核心算子，系统优化计算与访存流水。

results.en: Reached 87%+ of the hardware speed-of-light target.
Applied across recommendation, ads, and e-commerce workloads.
results.zh: 在信息流、电商推荐与原生广告场景落地。

title.zh: GPU 原生 ANN 检索

description.en: Partnered with Baidu Search to evaluate and integrate RAFT IVF-Flat, IVF-PQ, and CAGRA, including INT8 pre-quantization.
description.zh: 与百度搜索合作接入并测试 RAFT IVF-Flat、IVF-PQ、CAGRA，并完成 INT8 低精度方案验证。

results.en: Deployed in a core high-throughput search scenario.
results.zh: 在百度核心高吞吐搜索场景上线。

results.en: Delivered material performance and infrastructure savings.
results.zh: 取得显著性能与资源成本收益。

meta.zh: 高级软件开发工程师 · Data · 2022.08—2023.08

description.en: Helped build an internal platform spanning feature production, extraction, model training, management, and serving for daily sports-content recommendations.
description.zh: 从 0 到 1 参与构建覆盖特征生产、抽取、模型训练、管理和服务的内部机器学习平台。

label.zh: 北美体育用户日常推荐与推送

description.en: Developed graph-based ICF/UCF recall and refactored cold-start serving paths for Baidu Feed's multi-stage traffic distribution system.
description.zh: 参与流量阶梯分发机制，研发图召回 ICF/UCF，并重构冷启动在线服务链路。

label.en: production machines saved by one serving-path refactor
label.zh: 一次召回链路重构节省线上机器

description.en: Search and recommendation internships across ByteDance, NetEase Cloud Music, Microsoft Engineering, and Tencent.
description.zh: 曾在字节跳动、网易云音乐、微软工程院与腾讯参与搜广推相关实习。

title.en: OneRec: an HPC engine for industrial generative recommendation
title.zh: 基于 NVIDIA HPC 打造端到端生成式推荐 OneRec 训练

title.en: HSTU architecture analysis and performance optimization
title.zh: 生成式推荐 HSTU 结构分析与性能优化

title.en: NVIDIA recsys-examples: efficient large-scale generative recommendation
title.zh: NVIDIA recsys-examples：生成式推荐系统大规模训推实践

meta.zh: 联合作者 · NVIDIA 技术博客 · 2025

title.en: GPU-native ANN search: engineering practice with Baidu Search
title.zh: 基于 GPU 的 ANN 检索：百度搜索工程实践

meta.en: Reference implementations for modern large-scale recommendation systems
meta.zh: 现代大规模推荐系统参考实现

school.en: University of Chinese Academy of Sciences

degree.zh: 计算机系统结构 · 硕士

degree.en: B.Eng. in Internet of Things Engineering

name.en: Shandong Undergraduate Mathematics Competition · First Prize
name.zh: 山东省大学生数学竞赛一等奖

name.en: Lanqiao Cup, Shandong Embedded Development · Second Prize
name.zh: 蓝桥杯山东赛区单片机开发二等奖

publications.title: Optimization of workpiece detection model based on channel pruning and fixed-point quantization
Application of deep learning in workpiece defect detection

title.zh: 一起聊聊有挑战的性能问题。

description.en: I'm always happy to exchange ideas on GPU kernels, recommender systems, and scalable AI infrastructure.
description.zh: 欢迎交流 GPU Kernel、推荐系统与大规模 AI 基础设施。
